evals.prompt: Current AG state from sys.dm_hadr_database_replica_states and sys.dm_hadr_availability_replica_states. 3-replica AG. Tell me data loss risk and recovery time right now.
evals.expected_output: Per-replica state summary. Estimated data loss seconds (H7), estimated recovery time (H8). Redo queue (H11), send queue (H14). Disconnected replicas (H1, H5). Configuration review (H17-H22). Prioritized Action Order.

evals.prompt: Secondary is showing 620MB redo queue and 85 second lag. Is this an emergency?
evals.expected_output: H11 redo queue evaluation against thresholds. H9 secondary lag classification. Whether this is transient catch-up or persistent under-provisioning. Recommends investigating the workload generating excess log volume.
